productOrService.name: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- SHIPS, SMALL CRAFT, PONTOONS, AND FLOATING DOCKS

productOrServiceInformation.descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE CONTRACTOR SHALL REMOVE AND REPLACE IDENTIFIED SECTIONS OF STIFFENERS, WEB FRAMES, EQUIPMENT FOUNDATIONS, STUFFING TUBES, DECK PLATING, AND CO2 PIPING, AND PERFORM ALL REQUIRED EQUIPMENT REPAIRS ABOARD THE DREDGE MCFARLAND.
